scenarios.description: child(1) returns the second element on repeated calls without modifying children (cache hit branch)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent with two child elements appended
scenarios.expectedResult: Returns the same second Element instance on both first and second child(1) calls
pseudocode: TEST TC09 child uses cached childElementsList

scenarios.description: child(0) rebuilds and returns the new first element after a list modification (cache invalidation branch)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent with one child element appended
scenarios.expectedResult: After appending a new element, child(0) returns the original first element, demonstrating rebuild
pseudocode: TEST TC10 child rebuilds after modifying childNodes
